name: Pasta Shells with Peas and Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring 2 quarts of water to a boil over high heat. Cook the pasta shells until just underdone (about 5 minutes). Drain and rinse under cold water, then set aside. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sauté chicken for 2 minutes, then add peas, garlic, basil, thyme, parsley, and red bell pepper. Cook for an additional 2 minutes. Pour the mixture into a large baking dish. Add pasta shells and toss well. Sprinkle with Parmesan.
3. Bake at 400 degrees F for 20 minutes. Serve hot.
